additional_metadata.note: First Riyadh user group event; canceled/never confirmed a second speaker before cancellation.

events.agenda: 18:00 Registration; 18:30 Kickoff; 18:40 Speaker #1 - Anouar Hnini (dbt Labs); 19:10 Speaker #2 - to be confirmed; 19:30 Networking; 20:00 End of first user group Riyadh.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.raw_text: Canceled. Mon, Apr 28, 2025 · 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM AST. 18:40 Speaker #1 - Anouar Hnini, Solutions Architect, dbt Labs. 19:10 Speaker #2 - to be confirmed. Comment from attendee: "The event host is not going? So this event is canceled?"

anomalies.issue: First user group event for Riyadh was canceled; has 0 talks
